questions.question: Modern Flink 2.x source/sink API — что использовать в production?

options.text: FLIP-27 для sources: env.fromSource(KafkaSource.builder()...build(), watermarkStrategy, name) — SplitEnumerator + SourceReader архитектура. FLIP-191 для sinks: stream.sinkTo(KafkaSink.builder()...build()) — SinkV2 с SinkWriter/Committer/Pre/Post topology. Legacy SourceFunction/SinkFunction REMOVED в 2.0
В Flink 2.x нет sources/sinks, только Table API

questions.explanation: Flink 2.x требует FLIP-27 (Source) + FLIP-191 (SinkV2). FLIP-27: env.fromSource(source, watermarkStrategy, name), source имеет SplitEnumerator (один в JM) + SourceReader (N в TMs). Unified API для bounded/unbounded через Boundedness. FLIP-191 SinkV2: stream.sinkTo(sink), поддерживает SinkWriter + optional Committer (для EOS) + pre/post-commit topologies (для Iceberg/Paimon multi-stage commits). Legacy SourceFunction, RichSourceFunction, SinkFunction, TwoPhaseCommitSinkFunction — все REMOVED в 2.0.

questions.question: Какие три критичных capabilities делают KeyedProcessFunction самым powerful API в Flink?

options.text: (1) Keyed state: ValueState, ListState, MapState, ReducingState, AggregatingState — все scoped к ctx.getCurrentKey; (2) Timers: registerEventTimeTimer / registerProcessingTimeTimer + onTimer callback (event-time fires by watermark, processing-time fires by wall clock); (3) Side outputs: ctx.output(tag, value) для multi-output stream. 99% production logic пишется на этом API + timers + side outputs

questions.explanation: KeyedProcessFunction — flagship abstraction. Три capabilities: (1) keyed state — все state primitives через getRuntimeContext().getState(descriptor), scoped к current key; (2) timers через ctx.timerService() — событийные и processing-time, callback в onTimer; (3) side outputs через ctx.output(tag, value) — типизированные multi-output streams. Windowing/joins — wrappers поверх ProcessFunction, часто хуже perf и менее flexible для custom logic.

questions.question: Event-time vs processing-time timer — когда какой и какая ключевая проблема event-time timers в production?

options.text: Event-time fires когда watermark > registered_ts (event-time progress), deterministic, reproducible. Processing-time fires по wall clock TM, non-deterministic at replay. Главная prod проблема event-time: 'watermark stuck' — idle Kafka partition → весь stream watermark stuck → timers НЕ FIRE. Fix: WatermarkStrategy.withIdleness(Duration.ofMinutes(1))

questions.explanation: Event-time timer: trigger by watermark progress, deterministic (reproducible при replay), used для event semantics (window expiry, event-based timeouts, late detection). Processing-time: trigger by wall clock, non-deterministic at replay, для real-time SLA / periodic flushes / debouncing. Critical production issue event-time: 'watermark stuck' — stream watermark = MIN watermarks parallel sources, один idle partition → весь stream stuck → timers и windows не fires. Fix: withIdleness в WatermarkStrategy, чтобы idle partitions игнорировались в watermark computation.

questions.question: Side outputs use cases в production. Который из них — самый частый source потери данных без proper setup?

options.text: Late event capture. БЕЗ .sideOutputLateData(tag) в windowed aggregation late events SILENTLY DROPPED — самый частый production data loss. Production rule: ВСЕ windowed operations должны иметь sideOutputLateData + Prometheus alert на late_events_count. Также exception routing (DLQ) и timer side output — другие use cases

questions.explanation: Late event capture — критический use case side outputs. Без sideOutputLateData late events (event_time < watermark - allowedLateness) silently dropped. Production manifestation: aggregate metrics не match source, downstream data gap, невозможно объяснить customer. Rule: ALWAYS .allowedLateness(Duration).sideOutputLateData(lateTag).aggregate(...) для windowed ops. Plus Prometheus alert. Без alert blind. Other side output use cases: exception routing (DLQ — capture malformed records), multi-output split (single stream → multiple destinations by type), process timer side output (timeouts).

questions.question: Production AsyncFunction: throughput 100k events/sec, parallelism 16, p99 PG latency 20ms. Что нужно для production-grade setup?

options.text: Sync JDBC внутри asyncInvoke — async-обёртка делает его non-blocking

Async client (R2DBC для PG, не sync JDBC!). Capacity = throughput/parallelism × p99 latency = 6250 × 0.020 = 125 → round up 200 (headroom). Timeout = 3-5× p99 = ~100ms. ExponentialBackoff retry на network exceptions (не data errors). unorderedWait по умолчанию (head-of-line blocking avoided). Plus Redis cache layer для repeated lookups, metrics (hit rate, latency histogram)

questions.explanation: Production AsyncFunction stack: (1) **Async client** — R2DBC для PG, Lettuce для Redis, AsyncHttpClient. Sync JDBC внутри asyncInvoke блокирует mailbox — defeats purpose. (2) **Capacity** = target_throughput_per_subtask × p99_latency. Round up для headroom. Слишком низкое → backpressure, слишком высокое → external system OOM. (3) **Timeout** = 3-5× p99. Absorbs tail latency. (4) **Retry strategy** ExponentialBackoff с ifException(t -> t instanceof SocketTimeoutException || t instanceof IOException) — только network errors, не data errors. (5) **unorderedWait** для no head-of-line blocking. (6) **Cache layer** (Redis перед PG) — hit rate ~80%+ сильно reduces external load. (7) **Metrics**: cache hit rate, latency histogram, error rate — observability critical.

questions.question: BroadcastProcessFunction vs Async I/O — для какого use case какой подходит?

options.text: Broadcast: для slowly-changing config / rules / small reference data (in-memory, не RocksDB, размер ограничен heap, <100k entries). Identical state на всех subtasks. Async I/O: для huge или fast-changing external data (DB lookup, API call, ML inference). Когда identifier/data слишком большое для broadcast или нужен real-time access

questions.explanation: Choice based on data size + change frequency. **BroadcastProcessFunction**: для slowly-changing reference data (fraud rules, ML model weights, lookup tables). Config stream .broadcast(descriptor) → identical state на всех subtasks. ВАЖНОЕ limitation — broadcast state в-memory (не RocksDB), размер ограничен heap. Не для >100k entries. processElement — READ-ONLY broadcast state, processBroadcastElement — UPDATE. **Async I/O**: для huge external data (millions entries) или fast-changing (real-time updates needed). Decoupled lookup, обращается к external store. Trade-off: Broadcast — fast (local), Async I/O — flexible (any size, any data).

questions.question: DataStream V2 (FLIP-409) — статус и стратегия для new projects в 2026?

options.text: V2 production-ready, используйте для new projects

V2 — experimental preview в 2.0-2.2, production timeline 2.3-2.4 (~2027). Используйте V1 для new projects. Preparation для future migration: ALWAYS .uid() на stateful operators (savepoint compatibility), FLIP-27 sources / FLIP-191 sinks (не legacy addSource), POJO discipline, explicit state descriptors, avoid removed APIs. Migration ~2-3 years coexistence как DataSet→DataStream

questions.explanation: V2 status в Flink 2.2: experimental preview, breaking changes между minor versions, less mature tooling/documentation, minimal community resources. Production readiness timeline: 2.3-2.4 (~2027). Strategy для new projects в 2026: используйте V1 (production-grade, mature ecosystem). Preparation для будущей migration: (1) .uid() на каждом stateful operator — критично для savepoint compatibility; (2) FLIP-27 sources / FLIP-191 sinks вместо legacy; (3) POJO discipline для type safety; (4) explicit state descriptors с named ids; (5) avoid removed APIs (split/select, Queryable State, Reactive Mode). Migration через 1-2 года будет smooth.

questions.question: В production Flink 2.x всегда нужны: .uid() на каждом stateful operator (savepoint compatibility), pipeline.generic-types: false (fail-fast на Kryo fallback), .sideOutputLateData(tag) на windowed operations (no silent data loss), Async I/O для external lookups (no mailbox blocking).
questions.explanation: Этот четыре правила — fundament production-grade Flink. (1) .uid('descriptive-id') на каждом stateful operator — без UID Flink генерирует hash от topology, любое изменение pipeline ломает savepoint restoration. (2) pipeline.generic-types: false — fail-fast при Kryo fallback (50% perf hit). Force POJO discipline. (3) .sideOutputLateData(lateTag) — без этого late events silently dropped, самый частый source data loss. (4) Async I/O для external calls — без него sync calls блокируют mailbox, catastrophic backpressure (12-60x slowdown), checkpoints fail. Это checklist для каждого new production job.
